summary: All five requirements (REQ-34 through REQ-38) are substantially implemented. The floating music player component, settings page, hook, route registration, and nav link are all present. Minor concerns exist: several tracks in INITIAL_TRACKS share the same videoId ('Wr5ZMkMFnFk'), meaning only one distinct YouTube video is actually used for 6 of 8 tracks, which partially undermines REQ-34's requirement that each track is mapped to a real YouTube video ID. Everything else appears implemented correctly.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each of the 8 Sonic tracks must be mapped to a real (distinct) YouTube video ID
missing_requirements.reason: In useMusicPlayer.ts, 7 of the 8 INITIAL_TRACKS entries share the same videoId 'Wr5ZMkMFnFk'. Only Angel Island Zone Act 1 has a distinct ID ('xTBuMBqGMrI'). The remaining 6 tracks all use the same placeholder ID, so they do not play distinct real YouTube tracks as required.

hallucinated_features.description: Collapse/expand toggle button on the floating music player
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention a collapse or expand functionality for the floating player. FloatingMusicPlayer.tsx implements a ChevronDown/ChevronUp collapse toggle that hides the player controls, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Custom track name input field on the Settings page when importing a YouTube URL
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only specifies a YouTube URL input field and an Add Track button. SettingsPage.tsx also includes a separate customTrackName input field for naming the imported track, which was not requested.
